decision_focus: Should the company accelerate expansion and prepare a new investor narrative for the next fundraise?

risks.name: Enterprise deal slippage
risks.description: Large deals could move out one or two quarters.
risks.mitigation: Tighten forecast discipline and diversify into mid-market expansion.

risks.name: Hardware supply disruption
risks.description: Supplier delays could slow deployments and revenue recognition.
risks.mitigation: Qualify alternate suppliers and hold strategic buffer inventory.

risks.name: Fundraising window volatility
risks.description: Market conditions may weaken investor appetite or pricing.
risks.mitigation: Open the process earlier and protect runway with scenario-based spend controls.

board_requests: Approve the Q3 expansion budget and hiring plan.
Confirm fundraising readiness milestones for the next six months.
Review and sponsor the top three mitigation plans.
